chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI High Court Appeal No.197 of 2016 The Collector of Customs & others Versus M/s Engro Elengy Terminal (Pvt.) Limited & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For orders on CMA 2491/16 3. For hearing of main case. Dated: 11.01.2024 Mr. Waqar holds brief for Dr. Shah Nawaz Memon, advocate for appellants. -.-.- This High Court Appeal is pending since 2016 and it appears that since last few dates appellants’ counsel is not responding. He was called absent on 08.12.2021 and so also on the following date i.e. 28.08.2023 no one was present on behalf of the appellants. Today also counsel for the appellants is not in attendance. Instant High Court Appeal is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Judge Judge
